topic: My building's stairwell loses a floor between four and five every Friday at midnight
title: My Building's Stairwell Loses a Floor Between 4 and 5 Every Friday at Midnight | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My building's stairwell loses a floor between four and five every Friday at midnight.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a concrete stairwell at night with a single sodium light overhead, metal handrails visible, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Seven story walk up. Stairwell on the east side. Concrete steps. Metal railings.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior of a seven story brick walk up in a city neighborhood at dusk, fire escapes on one side, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a worn floor number plate reading 5 on a stairwell wall, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last March I came home at twelve oh three. Counted twelve flights to my floor on six.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a wristwatch showing twelve oh three AM, a hand resting on a metal railing, only the hand visible, vertical 9:16 framing
wide shot of a stairwell flight viewed from above, the steps descending into darkness, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Went back down. Counted. From the lobby up. Same. Twelve flights to six.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of fingers counting on a metal handrail, only the hand visible, dim stairwell light, vertical 9:16 framing
wide interior of a small superintendent's office with a man seen from behind at a workbench, no face visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I waited at midnight on Friday. The four landing was gone. Five sat where four had been.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a stairwell landing at midnight with the floor number sign visibly different from expected, dim sodium light overhead, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Stairwell rejoins itself at one AM. Always thirteen flights from then.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a wristwatch showing one oh oh AM on a metal handrail, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last Friday I stayed on the missing landing at midnight. It did not return.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of an empty stairwell landing with peeling paint on the concrete walls, no number visible on any wall, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I have stayed there since Friday.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a person seated on a stairwell step seen from behind, hood up, only the back visible, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I do not know what floor I am on. The numbers on the doors are wrong.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a stairwell door with a wrong number plate hanging askew, the doorway leading into darkness, vertical 9:16 framing
